<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Not only for us as individuals and families and churches, but for whole communities, states, and even nations as we fight to keep our eyes open, to keep our lamps trimmed and burning, to keep our flasks of oil ready and available for the groom's arrival.<|19.14|><|endoftext|>
